rationale: Section 26.051 governs procedural correction of unrecorded tax rate adoptions. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under §11.13(b) and creates no conflict with the proposed increase.
quote: Sec. 26.051. EVIDENCE OF UNRECORDED TAX RATE ADOPTION.
_note: No conflict; §26.051 is procedural and does not reference homestead exemption amounts.
